videos.title: 15 pharmacies. High-volume branches that used to need double cover. Not anymore 👇
videos.description:
15 pharmacies. High-volume branches that used to need double cover. Not anymore 👇

Sunil runs operations across Hollywood Chemist. He doesn’t do drama.

No forced restructure. Just a system change that made double cover unnecessary.

One pharmacist now handles what two used to. Checking is faster. Services still happen. And the branches that once demanded double cover are running smoother than before.

“We’re operating without double cover today, and the pharmacists within those branches now use AI. That frees them up to carry out services.”

Same volume. Lower pharmacist hours. More clinical time, not less.

That’s the Titan way 💪

#TitanPMR #PharmacyEfficiency #PharmacyAI

videos.title: 97% fewer near misses. Here's what changed.
videos.description:
What happens when patient safety stops competing with time?

At Safy’s Chemist, pharmacist Asif was running a high-volume pharmacy the hard way.
14,500 to 15,000 items a month.
Baskets piling up.
5 to 6 near misses every month.
A full day spent checking instead of caring.

Today, it looks completely different.

Since switching to Titan PMR, Safy’s Chemist has:
• Cut near misses by 97% (5–6/month → 2 in a year)
• Freed 85% of the pharmacist’s time for services
• Gone 100% paperless
• Built a calm, accountable dispensary the team owns
• Improved patient experience with barcode-led collections
• Created space to grow private services without chaos

In this full case study, Asif explains how:
• Barcode scanning blocks errors before they reach patients
• Built-in checks remove constant manual oversight
• One morning check replaces a full day on the bench
• Staff take responsibility instead of just moving baskets
• Even a small, space-limited pharmacy can scale safely

This is not about speed for the sake of speed.
It’s about building safety into the workflow, so pharmacists can focus on what actually matters.

📖 Read the full case study:
https://bit.ly/4stKw95

👉 Book a Titan PMR demo:
https://bit.ly/49gKQ1Z

#TitanPMR #CommunityPharmacy #PharmacyWorkflow #AIinPharmacy #PatientSafety #DigitalPharmacy #PharmacistLife #UKPharmacy

videos.title: Pritee - Short 1 -Safe, Efficient, People-Focused Pharmacy
videos.description:
Only one error in three years.

That doesn’t happen because people try harder
or check the same thing twice.

It happens when safety is designed into the workflow
so errors are prevented, not just caught.

In Pritee’s pharmacy, fewer manual steps and clearer system checks
reduced risk, removed the need for a second pharmacist,
and gave the team more time with patients.

Technology didn’t replace people.
It took responsibility for the routine work.

👉 Read the full case study: bit.ly/3UMTaQq

#CommunityPharmacy #PharmacyOwner #PharmacyLife #PharmacyWorkflow #DigitalPharmacy #FutureOfPharmacy

videos.title: Yusuf's pharmacies runs hundreds of consultations. Here's how.
videos.description:
What happens when a busy pharmacy group finally gets a clinical workflow that makes sense?

For BMP HEALTHCARE LTD, consultations used to be manual, scattered and slow — paper forms, missed questions, and countless systems pulling pharmacists away from the patient.

Then they became one of the first adopters of Titanverse.

NMS went live first, and everything changed:

• One pharmacist running services centrally across the group
• Senior management able to see the full workload in real time
• AI-driven clinical pathways showing red flags and gateway criteria
• Voice transcription capturing the whole consultation
• Instant summaries and safe next-step suggestions
• Tailored templates for travel, weight loss and Pharmacy First created on the spot
• Digital prescriptions generated instantly, ready to dispense through Titan PMR

Even experienced prescribers were surprised by the depth, clarity and safety of the system.

“The AI is literally the greatest thing I’ve ever seen.”

This is the story of how BMP turned manual consultations into a fast, joined-up, patient-centred workflow using Titanverse.

📖 Read the full case study: https://bit.ly/4nOpOgu
🌐 Learn more: https://titanverse.com

⸻

Full Story & SEO Summary

BMP Healthcare needed a safer, more efficient way to run clinical services across twelve branches. Titanverse gave them a single platform for NMS, Pharmacy First, travel health and weight management — complete with AI-guided pathways, automated templates, and real-time team visibility.

This video explores their early-adopter experience and the moment they realised they needed to level up their service model.

⸻

In this Case Study, you’ll see 👇

🧭 How BMP centralised NMS and improved group-wide visibility
🧪 How AI pathways highlight red flags, missed questions and gateway criteria
🎙️ How voice transcription transforms the patient conversation
⚡ How instant summaries and digital prescriptions cut admin to zero
📈 How Titanverse helps pharmacists deliver safer, more consistent services

⸻

Chapters

0:00 – Introduction
0:22 – The problem with manual consultations
0:55 – Becoming early adopters
1:20 – NMS as the first live module
1:55 – AI pathways and transcription
2:40 – Templates and digital prescriptions
3:10 – Why Titanverse changes everything

⸻

This video details how BMP Healthcare tackled a core challenge: a slow, manual pharmacy workflow bottlenecked by paper and legacy PMR systems.

After discovering Titan PMR at The Pharmacy Show 2023, Yusuf and his team implemented a new AI-assisted dispensing workflow that drove a 70% reduction in pharmacist checking time.

The full written case study reveals the complete before-and-after data, operational ROI, and Yusuf’s honest take on how Titan changed the pharmacist’s role — from checking items to leading care.

videos.title: The Independent Pharmacy Crisis: Why NHS Dependency Isn’t Sustainable | Tariq Muhammad
videos.description:
Pharmacy’s future isn’t in NHS dependency — it’s in independence.
At the 2025 Pharmacy Show, Tariq Muhammad, CEO of Titan PMR, shared a powerful message:
dispensing alone is no longer sustainable, and technology is the vehicle that will lead pharmacy out of crisis.

In this talk, Tariq explores how the profession became reliant on NHS funding, the reality behind the so-called “Pharmacy First” revolution, and how independent pharmacists can take control of their future through efficiency, trust, and private services.

💡 Key topics covered:
 • The rise and fall of NHS contract dependency
 • Why dispensing is no longer financially viable
 • The shift toward private clinical services
 • Six lessons for building a sustainable, independent pharmacy
 • How technology and AI are redefining the profession
 • Titanverse: the next chapter of pharmacy innovation

⸻

Learn more:
👉 https://titanpmr.com – Titan PMR: The intelligent dispensing platform.
👉 https://titanverse.co.uk – Titanverse: The everything app for pharmacy services.

⸻

videos.title: We built hub and spoke before it was legal
videos.description:
What happens when an independent pharmacy does not wait for October 2025 — and builds hub and spoke ahead of the law?

Jeet Vadodaria, Director and Superintendent Pharmacist at Medichem Pharmacy in West Yorkshire, runs four branches and dispenses over 40,000 items a month. Instead of drowning in baskets and duplicate stock, he used Titan PMR and Titan P2P to create his own hub and spoke system.

In this full case study, you’ll see how Jeet:
• Made dispensers four times more efficient (12–15 items/hour → 40–45)
• Reduced stockholding across branches by 45%
• Used Titan P2P to share workload instantly between sites
• Built in contingency so the system never stalls
• Freed pharmacists to focus on services and patient care
• Reframed his branches as health clinics, not just dispensing units

“Peer to peer is a brand new tool, which Titan has enabled us to use at the minute. And I think it’s amazing, because if you are part of the same group, you could technically consider sending your prescriptions to be dispensed at your other branch.” – Jeet Vadodaria

From October 2025, hub and spoke will be open to every independent. Medichem Pharmacy shows what it looks like in practice.

📖 Full case study: https://bit.ly/481Gih1

#TitanPMR #PharmacyWorkflow #HubAndSpoke #IndependentPharmacy #CommunityPharmacy #PharmacyLeadership #AIinPharmacy #DigitalPharmacy #NHSPharmacy

videos.title: Pritee used to stay late every night. Not anymore.
videos.description:
What happens when a pharmacist replaces stress with calm — and builds a team that can thrive?

Pritee, Superintendent Pharmacist and owner of Howletts Pharmacy in Ruislip, was once buried in baskets, tied up in accuracy checks, and losing days on end-of-month claims. Services suffered, and growth felt out of reach.

Today, her pharmacy looks very different:
• 6,500 items a month dispensed with confidence
• 50–60% of prescriptions AI-checked by Titan
• 20–30% faster dispensing with Batch Flow
• 60–70 BP checks every month (up from 10–15)
• A growing private weight management service with 18 active clients
• From 1 private consultation a month → to 2–3 every day
• End-of-month claims done in minutes, not days

For Pritee, the biggest impact isn’t just efficiency. It’s culture.

“Technology is wonderful, but it can’t replace people. Titan frees my staff up to be there for the community — and that’s what matters most.”

This is what pharmacy looks like when digital-first means human-first.

📖 Read the full case study: bit.ly/3UMTaQq

#PharmacyWorkflow #TitanPMR #AIinPharmacy #PharmacyServices #CommunityPharmacy #DigitalPharmacy #PharmacyLeadership #HowlettsPharmacy #NHSPharmacy

videos.title: Akbar does 32,000 items a month. And isn’t even there.
videos.description:
What does pharmacy look like when the owner can walk away — and everything still runs?

At Drayton Prime Pharmacy in Portsmouth, Akbar and Malia have built one of the highest-volume independent pharmacies in the UK.
They dispense over 32,000 items a month, manage 30 care homes, deliver 350+ NMSS, and never stay late.

In this full case study, you’ll see how Titan helped them:
• Replace 3 to 4 full-time staff with streamlined systems
• Eliminate late nights and overtime
• Automate 70% of clinical checks with Titan AI
• Manage urgent scripts and care homes with full visibility
• Scale NMSS delivery from zero to over 350 per month
• Run the pharmacy whether Akbar’s in or not

No panic. No paper. Just a calm, confident pharmacy team doing what matters.

📖 Read the full case study: https://bit.ly/4ldjbDg

#TitanPMR #PharmacyWorkflow #DigitalPharmacy #AIinPharmacy #PharmacyLeadership #DraytonPrimePharmacy #NMSS #CommunityPharmacy #NHSPharmacy #PharmacyServices

videos.description:

Sagar took over an old-school pharmacy.

videos.title: Rahul Freed 20 Hours a Week and Rebuilt His Pharmacy Around Services | Titan PMR
videos.description:
What happens when a pharmacist stops chasing paper and starts leading services?

Rahul Puri, Superintendent Pharmacist at Puri Pharmacy in Southall and Hillingdon, is part of a new generation of leaders who blend clinical care, commercial thinking, and digital-first systems.

In this full case study, Rahul shares how he:
 • Freed up at least 20 hours a week for the pharmacist team
 • Doubled Pharmacy First and service appointments
 • Moved from paper chaos to full digital visibility
 • Sends automatic SMS updates without extra admin
 • Uses Titan AI and Repeat Flow to streamline core workflow
 • Evolved the business into a true community health hub

From scribbles and stress to scale and services. This is what leadership looks like.

📖 Full case study: bit.ly/408lMqm

videos.description:
How do you grow a pharmacy more than four times over and keep everything running smoothly?

Sagar, owner of Brighton Hill Pharmacy in Basingstoke, took over a former Boots branch, which dispensed 4,000 items a month.
Today, he dispenses over 17,000 items with a calm team, digital-first workflow, and a system that flows.
